title: Victorian Townhouse – Market Harborough
description: Elegant five-bedroom Victorian townhouse within walking distance of Market Harborough town centre. Renovated throughout with period features and modern finishes.

title: Modern Family Home – Little Bowden
description: Spacious four-bedroom detached home in the sought-after Little Bowden area. Open-plan kitchen, private garden, and double garage.

title: Town Centre Investment Apartment
description: Contemporary two-bedroom apartment in central Market Harborough. Strong rental demand and long-term tenant in place.
